levels.subtitle: Manage active levels and their historical versions.

distribution.title: Active score distribution
distribution.deactivationHelp: Review the deterministic redistribution before confirming. The target level will become historical.
distribution.help: Adjust all active ranges together. The distribution must cover every score from 0 to 100 without gaps or overlaps.

validation.distribution: Use whole-number ranges that cover 0 to 100 continuously without gaps or overlaps.

errors.title: We could not complete that action.

confirm.title: Deactivate level
confirm.message: Are you sure? This keeps historical records and removes the level from active classification.
confirm.distribution: Save this complete score distribution? All changed ranges will be versioned together.

passingScoreNote.title: Passing score only
